# Enfoque Extremo - React Game

## Project Overview
Juego de concentración desarrollado en React donde el jugador debe mantener presionado un botón mientras resiste múltiples distracciones visuales y sonoras.

## Project Type
- Framework: React 19.2.4 with Vite 8.0.1
- Language: JavaScript
- Game mechanics: Button press with distractions (vibrations, fake buttons, flashes, color changes, sound alerts)

## Installation
```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

## Project Structure
```
deploy/
├── src/
│   ├── App.jsx       # Main game component
│   ├── App.css       # Game styles
│   ├── main.jsx      # Entry point
│   └── index.css     # Global styles
├── public/           # Static files
└── package.json      # Dependencies
```

## Game Features
- Real-time timer tracking
- Best score persistence
- Random distractions (screen shake, fake buttons, flashes, color shifts, sounds)
- Responsive design
- Touch and mouse support

## Setup Complete
✅ Project scaffolded with Vite + React
✅ Game component created with all distractions
✅ Styles implemented
✅ Dependencies installed
✅ Development task configured
✅ README updated

## Development Commands
- `npm run dev` - Start development server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build
- `npm run lint` - Run linter
